data.body: 76d2 DEPLOY FULLY WORKING. 3 live checks ALL PASS via API GW p38uolodo3: (1) SigV4-signed round-trip submit->202->poll->COMPLETED verdict=PASS with a real signed DSSE op-cert envelope (the trusted environment signed rebar.opcert.v1); (2) unsigned request -> 403 at API GW; (3) direct-to-origin no-guard -> 403 at nginx. Gerrit HTTP 200 throughout. Third deploy blocker found+fixed: opcert compose service lacked AWS_REGION (boto3 SSM fetch 'must specify a region') -> added AWS_REGION/AWS_DEFAULT_REGION default us-east-1 (applied on box, recreated container -> PASS). Landing the AWS_REGION compose fix under bug accc, then operator-attested close of 76d2.
